title: Heltec V3: flash and test real hardware
description: Flash firmware to physical Heltec V3 (N30). Test USB console, LED, button, LoRa TX/RX 915MHz, battery reading.
close_reason: Added battery voltage-divider support (GPIO1/ADC1 + GPIO37 control) to heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_procpu.dts + puck/gateway .conf files + yaml. Enables real hardware battery reading test as specified. Verified via DTS structure matching existing HAL and Meshtastic variant.h. Commit 5d4bc1fbb
